title: 5/25〜5/29 Weekly Market Report
summary: 31/67 themes advanced (-0.71% avg). Defense (+4.4%) and Inbound Tourism (+3.2%) led. AI themes consolidated after prior week surge.
report:
## Market Overview (Week of May 26–30)

Consolidation after prior week's surge. 31 of 67 themes advanced, average return -0.71%.

---

## Rising Themes

### 🥇 #1: Defense & Aerospace (+4.4%)
UAV and standoff missile procurement plans announced.

### 🥈 #2: Shipbuilding (+3.7%)
New LNG carrier orders confirmed for Japanese yards.

### 🥉 #3: Inbound Tourism (+3.2%)
May visitor statistics set new record; yen at 152–155 continues attracting foreign visitors.

---

## Falling Themes

Semiconductor Equipment (-2.9%), AI Datacenter (-2.1%) — healthy consolidation after 8–11% prior week gains. Momentum remains 'Continuing'.

---

## StockWaveJP Commentary

Post-surge consolidation in AI themes is healthy. Key next catalyst: Fed policy meeting or additional Nvidia data. Recommend balanced allocation between AI/tech and structural domestic themes (Defense, Inbound Tourism).

> **Disclaimer**: For informational purposes only. All investment decisions are your sole responsibility.
